description_long: This lamp features a modern, minimalist design with a smooth, white conical body and a flat, light wood-toned top. A slender, curved wooden handle arches over the top, attached at two points, suggesting portability or a decorative accent. The lamp is suspended from a thin cord connected to a simple, cylindrical ceiling mount, indicating it is designed to hang from above. The body appears to be made of a matte or semi-glossy material, likely plastic or frosted glass, with the top and handle crafted from natural wood. The overall aesthetic is clean and Scandinavian-inspired, blending functional lighting with subtle decorative elements. The lamp's compact size and neutral color palette make it suitable for a variety of urban environments, such as cafes, sidewalks, or modern residential spaces.
description: A hanging pendant lamp with a white conical body, light wood top, and a curved wooden handle, suspended from a ceiling mount. Its minimalist design combines matte white and natural wood for a modern, versatile look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the white conical body, flat wood top, and the curved wooden handle arching over the lamp.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the profile of the lamp, with the wooden handle visible as a vertical line and the attachment points on the wood top.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the handle arch and the smooth, uninterrupted surface of the lamp body.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the handle as a vertical element and the clean lines of the lamp's silhouette.
